summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pro Mode feature for multi-camera streaming. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend pages (Control Panel, QR Codes, Camera Device) render correctly with proper navigation and functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: Event has premium streaming package (required for Pro Mode)
Backend: Pro Mode session creation API works for authenticated creators
Backend: Unauthenticated session creation correctly rejected (401)
Backend: Pro Mode session retrieval API works for authenticated creators
Backend: Unauthenticated session retrieval correctly rejected (401)
Backend: Non-existent session returns 404
Backend: Public device registration with valid connection token works
Backend: Public device registration with invalid token rejected (403)
Backend: Invalid device numbers (0, 6) correctly rejected (400)
Backend: Control panel connection API works for authenticated creators
Backend: Unauthenticated control panel connection rejected (401)
Backend: Device switching API works for authenticated creators
Backend: Unauthenticated device switching rejected (401)
Backend: Transition type update API works (cut, fade, dissolve, blend)
Backend: Invalid transition type rejected (400)
Backend: Unauthenticated transition update rejected (401)
Backend: Go Live API requires connected devices
Backend: Unauthenticated Go Live rejected (401)
Frontend: Pro Mode Control Panel renders correctly
Frontend: MULTI-CAM badge displayed
Frontend: 5 camera slots in grid
Frontend: Transition buttons (cut, fade, dissolve, blend) work
Frontend: Connect Cameras button navigates to QR page
Frontend: Audio Settings panel with Balance/Treble/Bass controls
Frontend: End Stream button visible when live
Frontend: QR Codes page renders 5 QR codes with connection tokens
Frontend: Copy Link functionality works
Frontend: Back to Control Panel navigation works
Frontend: Camera Device page validates connection token
Frontend: Camera Device page shows error when device slot taken
Frontend: Camera Device page attempts LiveKit connection
critical_code_review_comments: Pro Mode implementation is well-structured with proper authentication checks
Connection token mechanism provides secure device registration without requiring full auth
LiveKit integration is properly configured with correct token generation
WebSocket connections for real-time device status updates are working
Transition effects (cut, fade, dissolve, blend) are implemented with CSS animations
seed_data_creation: Used existing test event: test-event-chat-1771457019709 with streaming_package=premium. Pro Mode session already created with connection_token for device registration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pro Mode feature is fully functional. Test event 'test-event-chat-1771457019709' has an active Pro Mode session with devices 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 registered. The stream is currently live. Connection token: mPElHe2BcykOKvkyCSr_zsgatxhJFFdIjGzwapp6Efw
